summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Healthmax Tracking app with green/olive theme restyling. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: All protected endpoints return 401 without auth token
Frontend login page loads with forest green gradient background
Frontend 'Healthmax Tracking' heading with leaf icon present
Frontend email/password inputs and Google sign-in button present
Frontend Create Account toggle functionality works
Frontend protected routes redirect to login (/dashboard, /workouts, /nutrition)
Frontend dark navy card styling (#1a2535) verified
Frontend green primary button color (#5b9a3c) verified
